name: Persistence Registry Key for Recycle Bin
notes:
This rule detects persistence registry key for recycle bin.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: frack113
SIGMA Title: Registry Persistence Mechanisms in Recycle Bin
SIGMA Description: Detects persistence registry keys for Recycle Bin


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001833) RegistryEvent (Key and Value Rename), (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

when the event matches ( qid == 5001832 AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\clsid\{645ff040-5081-101b-9f08-00aa002f954e}\shell\open\command\(default)%' ) OR ( qid == 5001833 AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\clsid\{645ff040-5081-101b-9f08-00aa002f954e}\shell\open%' ) AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Persistence Registry Key for Recycle Bin on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001833) RegistryEvent (Key and Value Rename), (5001832) RegistryEvent (Value Set)

AND when the event matches ( 	qid == 5001832 	AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\clsid\{645ff040-5081-101b-9f08-00aa002f954e}\shell\open\command\(default)%' )  OR  ( 	qid == 5001833 	AND LOWER("Registry Key") LIKE '%\clsid\{645ff040-5081-101b-9f08-00aa002f954e}\shell\open%' ) AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Persistence Registry Key for Recycle Bin
Event description: Detects persistence registry key for recycle bin.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
